notes: This batch processes only the nested CACHE__HIGH_ENTROPY__RECENT__PURGEABLE root under the moved-out-of-git archive mirror and treats it as historical archive routing residue, not current authority.
The cache root is structurally narrow: its only meaningful child is HEAT_DUMPS, which contains nearly the entire subtree payload.

HEAT_DUMPS holds 13 timestamped families: 1 RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION_A1_WORKING family, 1 RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION_REAL_LOOP_HISTORY family, 5 generic RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION families, and 6 SAVE_EXPORT_ROTATION families.
The earliest run-rotation manifests use relative source/destination paths, while later run/save manifests switch to absolute workspace paths.
RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION__20260225T005815Z is the broadest mixed sweep, keeping RUN_REAL_LOOP_DEEP_0020 and RUN_REAL_LOOP_DEEP_0021 while moving 53 heterogeneous run/test families.
RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION__20260225T010616Z and RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION__20260225T011409Z preserve repeated compact eight-object test/real-loop bundles.
SAVE_EXPORT_ROTATION__20260225T010624Z is a manifest-only shell: its manifest declares 8 kept artifacts and 0 moved artifacts, but the folder retains only rotation_manifest.json.
RUN_SURFACE_ROTATION__20260225T050420Z is a payload-only run residue: it contains RUN_REAL_LOOP_DEEP_0025 but no enclosing rotation_manifest.json.
SAVE_EXPORT_ROTATION__20260225T012831Z and SAVE_EXPORT_ROTATION__20260225T051154Z are payload-only save residues containing zips and sha256 sidecars but no rotation manifest.
The subtree therefore preserves three packaging states at once: manifested rotations, manifest-only shell, and payload-only residue.
possible_downstream_consequence_policy: possible downstream consequence only; no direct A2-1 or A1 promotion from this batch
source_family: archive heat dumps nested cache recent purgeable carrier
